execution.command: uv run biominer dev vision prototype-benchmark-matrix --config config/pilot/papilio_demoleus_prototype_b0_b16.json

known_limitations: No reference label is independently human taxonomically verified.
Provider-supported retrieval consistency is not classification accuracy.
The selected policy is uncalibrated and emits no probabilities.
Seventy-nine of 81 frozen references are research-only under the current licence policy.
Regional and layered reference conditioning can remove the target in sparse clusters.
The larval route has no support_train prototype and the pinned-specimen route has no frozen reference.
No visual-domain negative passed the final support freeze.
Focused and masked visual-input ablations were unavailable; B11 and B12 reused raw full-frame evidence and recorded that limitation.
Five Flickr download/decode failures and ten reference-source failures remain retryable.
The YOLOE router produced a strong pupa/ambiguous-route warning during smoke and staged inference; routing accuracy is not validated.
Two support records lack owner evidence, so leakage protection is not claimed complete.
The staged Flickr inference distribution must not be interpreted as a population prevalence estimate.
data.required_statement: This prototype demonstrates the architecture and few-shot retrieval workflow. Provider-supported reference labels have not all received independent human taxonomic verification.

items.work: Run independent second review and resolve conflicts.
Freeze a fully verified reference bank and rerun leakage-safe splits.
Close reference-acquisition shortfalls and route gaps.
Perform full licence and public-display review.

items.effort_estimate: 2-4 engineering days after reviewed labels exist
items.work: Fit independent calibration and lock selective-risk thresholds.

items.effort_estimate: 3-5 engineering days plus expert review time
items.work: Run final scientific holdout and taxonomic performance validation.
Implement missing evaluation and runtime instrumentation.

items.effort_estimate: 5-8 engineering days for migration; 2-3 days for initial monitoring
items.work: Plan production-default migration and long-term drift monitoring.

data.non_blocking_statement: These items are required for scientific or production release but do not block the accepted Build Week prototype.

authorization.reason: All 14 prototype entry gates pass; scientific and public-release limitations remain.

prototype_limitations: No reference label is independently human taxonomically verified.
The selected policy is uncalibrated and emits no probabilities.
Seventy-nine of 81 frozen references are research-only.
No pinned-specimen reference or larval support_train prototype exists.
No visual-domain negative passed the final support freeze.
Two support records lack owner evidence.
Five Flickr failures and ten reference-source failures remain retryable.
Focused and masked visual-input evidence was unavailable.
YOLOE routing accuracy is not independently validated.
Prototype inference distributions are not accuracy or prevalence estimates.

post_freeze_shortfalls: Ten Wikimedia media records remain retryable operational failures.
The single larval record is assigned to calibration, so there is no larval support_train prototype.
No visual-domain negative or pinned-specimen record passed the prototype freeze.
Full-bank detector evidence is not instrumented locally.
Two selected records lack owner evidence, so leakage protection is not claimed complete.
No support row is independently human taxonomically verified.

staged_preselection_abstention.policy_note: These counts come from the staged preselection runner and are distinct from the frozen Task 14.5 raw-margin-0.10 policy.
